'''Dreena''' was a nearly uninhabited [[Ocean/Legends|ocean]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] visited by [[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[Isolder]] and his father during Isolder's childhood, playing in the pure [[Ocean/Legends|oceans]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]].

{{Planet-stub}}

*''[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest]]'' {{Mo}}
